title: hymenophyllum microphyllum
intro: Hymenophyllum microphyllum, also known as the small-leaved filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum microphyllum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or decoction for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
